commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4b559f0516e3aa555862312caebb47f42c043c31)
commands.review_summary:
The PR drops `mergeStreamingText` from Feishu streaming-card session updates and suppresses `onPartialReply` after block-delivery updates.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds full combined reasoning/status snapshots and the PR still routes non-prefix rewrites through the streaming update path instead of the replacement path. I did not run a live Feishu tenant session.
commands.review_followup: Needs human follow-up because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the remaining append-versus-replace delivery behavior must be fixed and validated before merge.

target.title: fix(feishu): eliminate streaming card content duplication
target.author: hpumajun

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
